name: José Miguel Fernández
headline: Full-stack developer | Backend, web products, automation
tagline: Full-stack developer with a strong backend base, building simple, reliable and useful software.
focus: Backend systems, full-stack delivery, automation and practical web products
availability: Open to freelance projects, collaborations and software engineering opportunities.
summary: I build websites, tools, automations and backend systems that are simple to use, reliable in practice and easy to maintain.
My strongest base is backend development with Java, Spring Boot and production systems, but I can move across the stack when a product needs it.

focusAreas.title: Backend systems
focusAreas.description: APIs, services, integrations and data workflows built for reliability and maintainability.

focusAreas.title: Delivery and infrastructure
focusAreas.description: Release workflows, containers, CI/CD and deployment practices that help software move from code to production with fewer surprises.

focusAreas.title: Web products and tools
focusAreas.description: Useful interfaces, internal tools and automations that reduce manual work and make workflows easier to run.

focusAreas.title: Distributed systems
focusAreas.description: Services, queues and event-driven flows that communicate clearly and remain observable in production.

experience.description: Contributing to cloud-native backend systems for The Workshop, working with product, platform and SRE teams in a security-conscious production environment.
highlights: Develop and maintain backend services in Java and Spring Boot, with attention to clear architecture, DDD and maintainable code.
Design and implement REST APIs and internal integrations with attention to reliability, testability and production visibility.
Work with RabbitMQ and asynchronous communication patterns to support reliable integrations in distributed systems.
Collaborate with SRE and Platform on Kubernetes-based deployments, Grafana and Kibana observability, automated health checks and operational consistency.
Contribute to CI/CD improvements through automated testing, security checks, artifact versioning and more reliable deployment workflows.
Diagnose and resolve incidents in distributed systems with a focus on performance, resilience and maintainability.

experience.description: Worked across backend, frontend and infrastructure for education platforms used in multiple international markets.
highlights: Designed and implemented Docker-based infrastructure to improve environment consistency, scalability and team productivity.
Contributed to deployment and delivery improvements, supporting more efficient and reliable release flows.
Helped move the platform toward a multi-language, multi-portal structure for international growth.
Integrated payment systems and built advanced search with Elasticsearch to improve result quality and user experience.
Worked on platform performance, scalability and Core Web Vitals, with positive impact on SEO and engagement.
Developed and maintained backend and frontend features with PHP, Phalcon, JavaScript, HTML and CSS, while also reinforcing code review and development standards.

education.degree: Master's Degree in Web and Mobile Technologies Programming
education.description: Graduate program focused on web and mobile development, application architecture and digital product delivery.

education.degree: Higher Technician in Cross-Platform Application Development
education.description: Advanced technical training in software development across platforms, covering Java, databases, testing, version control and application architecture.

certifications.name: Testing Spring Boot: Beginner to Guru
Master Microservices with Spring Boot, Docker and Kubernetes

company.title: Microservices Modernization Platform
company.context: International backend team modernizing a cloud platform for a product organization operating at enterprise scale.
company.summary: Worked on platform modernization around service boundaries, secure APIs, database delivery workflows and release confidence during the move away from a legacy monolith.
highlights: Contributed to a long-term migration from a Scala monolith toward a cleaner and more maintainable service architecture.
Helped improve release confidence through secure service work, automated database delivery and contract testing.
Supported a product platform where technical clarity mattered as much as feature progress.

company.title: Real-Time WebSocket Gateway Service
company.context: Backend proof of concept for real-time communication between digital clients and internal services inside an enterprise platform.
company.summary: Worked on a WebSocket gateway PoC built with Java and Spring Boot to manage user connections, rooms, event broadcasting and communication with internal services through Redis pub/sub and gRPC.
highlights: Worked on WebSocket infrastructure for connecting users to rooms and keeping connection state controlled.
Worked on Redis pub/sub integration for cross-instance broadcasting and gRPC communication with other backend services.
Helped document and validate local test flows so the service was easier to run, review and evolve.

company.title: Euroinnova International Education Platform
company.context: Core digital product used to capture, convert and serve educational demand across multiple markets.
company.summary: Worked across backend, frontend and infrastructure on a large education platform, with focus on performance, business delivery and maintainable evolution.
highlights: Worked on lead generation, search, payment and UX-critical flows with direct product impact.
Helped evolve the platform toward a multi-language, multi-portal structure for international growth.
Balanced performance, maintainability and business delivery across a high-traffic digital product.

company.title: EduCash Affiliate Platform
company.context: Affiliate management product supporting operational reporting, partner workflows and payment-related processes.
company.summary: Worked on the delivery and evolution of an internal digital product used to manage affiliate relationships, reporting flows and operational processes tied to growth channels.
highlights: Contributed from initial implementation through ongoing iteration and operational adoption.
Worked on reporting, partner workflows and internal operations tooling connected to business processes.
Balanced practical usability with the realities of product, operations and growth.

personal.title: Betx
personal.context: Technical CLI for recording bets, odds, states and results locally, with declarative configuration and lightweight persistence.
personal.summary: Backend project built as a terminal tool for keeping a structured local betting record. The focus is on modeling the flow clearly, separating HTTP integrations, reading configuration from betx.yml and keeping a SQLite database simple to operate.
highlights: Designed a Picocli command-line interface to run the main workflow from the terminal without depending on a web UI.
Used betx.yml as the local configuration point for keeping credentials, endpoints and runtime settings outside the code.
Separated SQLite persistence, CLI commands and HTTP integrations so the backend stays easier to test and evolve.

personal.title: CV Studio
personal.context: A professional CV builder designed for technical profiles with live editing, strong data modeling and polished PDF output.
personal.summary: A personal product built around structured CV data, live editing and document generation. The main work was the data model, validation, interface and a clear user workflow.

imgHover.alt: CV Studio live preview and PDF export

highlights: Built a real-time editor with synchronized preview over structured JSON data and reusable templates.
Implemented ATS-friendly PDF export with focus on layout consistency and document quality.
Combined product polish with typed validation and document-generation architecture.
